# Local YDB Toolkit

Local YDB Toolkit helps AI coding agents operate Docker-based local-ydb environments across Codex, MCP clients, and GitHub Actions CI.

Key URLs:
- Home and install: https://astandrik.github.io/local-ydb-toolkit/
- MCP comparison: https://astandrik.github.io/local-ydb-toolkit/local-ydb-mcp-vs-ydb-mcp.html
- GitHub Actions local YDB: https://astandrik.github.io/local-ydb-toolkit/setup-local-ydb-github-actions.html
- Diagnostics: https://astandrik.github.io/local-ydb-toolkit/diagnose-local-ydb-mcp.html
- Schema DDL: https://astandrik.github.io/local-ydb-toolkit/ydb-schema-ddl-mcp.html
- Tool roundup: https://astandrik.github.io/local-ydb-toolkit/best-tools-local-ydb-ai-agents.html

Repository: https://github.com/astandrik/local-ydb-toolkit
MCP npm package: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@astandrik/local-ydb-mcp
GitHub Action: https://github.com/astandrik/setup-local-ydb

Note: this file is provided as an agent convenience index. It is not required for inclusion in Google AI features and is not a substitute for normal crawling, indexing, and useful public content.
